title: pavonia subhastata
intro: Pavonia subhastata, also known as the tropical rosemallow or rosemallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. It is a perennial plant that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia subhastata include treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or poultice for its herbal preparations.
